meaning: n.镶嵌成小方格,棋盘形布置,镶嵌式铺装
examples: Each cell in a Voronoi tessellation is a convex polyhedron.
Reduced terrain mesh popping from over-aggressive tessellation.
We can also change tessellation level based on distance from the camera.
Escher and his use of tessellation which uses a two-dimensional plane with a repeating geometric shape with no overlaps and no gaps.
The 3DMark DirectX 11 tech demo brings this scene to life with intelligent tessellation and advanced volumetric lighting using real-time light scattering.
